Name: Pythagorean Theorem
Definition: In a right triangle the square of the hypotenuse equals the sum of squares of the other two sides

Name: Derivative Power Rule
Definition: Derivative of x to the n

Name: Integration by Parts
Formula: math`\int{a, b, u*v'} = u*v - \int{a, b, u'*v}`

Name: Area of Circle
Definition: Area enclosed by a circle of radius r
